news.summary: As Mali's junta mourns the death of Defence Minister Sadio Camara, with thousands coming out to pay tribute, FRANCE 24's François Picard welcomes Paul Melly, Consulting Fellow for the Africa Programme at Chatham House and an expert on the Sahel region. news.headline: Why Countries Are Stocking Up on Gold
news.summary: As risk has escalated, central banks have bought more gold to stash in reserve. A widening Middle East war could add to the urgency.
